title: Already have 3-5 SIPs running? Expert shares a checklist before you add another fund
summary: Investors who already have 3 to 5 SIPs running should review their existing portfolio before adding another fund. The expert recommends focusing on 5 key areas: goal alignment, portfolio overlap, risk balance, contribution sizing, and regular portfolio reviews.

summary: ITR-2 filing for AY 2026-27 requires careful reporting of capital gains, multiple properties, foreign assets and other income. Learn who must file ITR-2, key online filing steps, deadline and practical tips to submit accurate tax returns before 31 July 2026.

title: Top 5 dividend yield funds based on 5-year returns: ICICI Prudential Dividend Yield Fund leads with 19.95% returns
summary: Based on 5-year CAGR performance, ICICI Prudential Dividend Yield Equity Fund has emerged as the top-performing scheme in the category, delivering 19.95% returns. LIC MF Dividend Yield Fund and HDFC Dividend Yield Fund follow.&nbsp;

title: EPFO's 2026 overhaul: key takeaways from the latest EPF, EPS, EDLI schemes
summary: The new EPF Scheme, 2026 does not make higher PF contributions optional. Here's what remains unchanged, what has changed, and what it means for employees and employers.

title: Section 54 relief: ITAT allows tax exemption on 23 flats, wipes out ₹8 crore demand
summary: A Bengaluru ITAT ruling allowed a landowner to claim capital gains exemption on 23 flats received under a redevelopment deal. The relief, however, applies to older joint development agreements executed before key tax law changes.

title: Selling gold in 2026? Your holding period could decide how much tax you pay
summary: Gold ETFs, gold mutual funds and physical gold are taxed differently, with holding periods ranging from 12 to 24 months to qualify for lower long-term capital gains tax. Selling too soon could result in gains being taxed at your income-tax slab rate instead.

title: ITR filing 2026: Claiming a Section 80G deduction? Don't miss this new requirement
summary: Taxpayers claiming deductions under Section 80G will now have to disclose payment reference details while filing their income tax return. The new disclosure is part of the Income Tax Department's push to digitally verify deduction claims.&nbsp;

title: EPFO's new PF transfer system: How to move your EPF balance without paperwork
summary: EPFO has introduced 2 online EPF transfer options under the new scheme, enabling employees to consolidate PF accounts, preserve service history, improve pension eligibility, avoid tax issues on eligible withdrawals and also secure EDLI insurance benefits of up to ₹7 lakh.

title: Received a Section 245 notice? Here's why your income tax refund may be adjusted against pending tax demand
summary: A Section 245 intimation is issued when the Income Tax Department proposes to adjust your refund against an outstanding tax demand from the previous year. Taxpayers can check the demand details on the e-filing portal and respond by accepting the demand or disputing it within the given timeline.

title: New Income Tax Act: CBDT issues FAQs on pending tax cases, TDS and transition rules
summary: CBDT has clarified how pending tax cases, assessments, and TDS certificate applications will move after the Income-tax Act 2025 takes effect from April 2026. The FAQs explain which matters stay under the old law and which follow new provisions.

title: TCS announces interim dividend of Rs 12 per share. Check record date
summary: Tata Consultancy Services announced an interim dividend of Rs 12 per share for shareholders. The IT major reported a 5% year-on-year profit increase for the first quarter. Its revenue from operations also saw a significant 14% rise during the same period.
